selected_paper.title: Parallel Activin and BMP signaling coordinates R7/R8 photoreceptor subtype pairing in the stochastic Drosophila retina
selected_paper.selection_rationale: The open eLife PDF explicitly discusses several Drosophila genes in Activin/BMP/Hippo/R8 subtype specification results, making it suitable for live multi-gene extractor and validator dispatch coverage.

original_batch_probe.sandbox_commit_subject: Add batch validator dispatch for gene validation

tightened_batch_post_change.sandbox_commit_subject: Tighten gene validator batch lookup guidance

interpretation.live_runtime_shape: Each successful gene extractor attempt returned one domain envelope containing four gene_mention_evidence objects, so dispatch_active_validator_bindings saw four DomainValidationRequest values in one call. The flow made two extractor attempts in the batch-enabled runs because the supervisor still ended with incomplete_flow_steps.
interpretation.chosen_strategy: Case A plus Case C: keep the existing single-envelope dispatcher batching and tighten the generic batch payload plus gene validator prompt so compatible gene requests are grouped into one search_genes_bulk lookup per shared provider/species context.

pre_batch_vs_post_change.summary: The tightened batch run improved over the original batch probe but was still slower than the pre-batch parallel singleton validator path in this benchmark.

remaining_bottlenecks: The flow repeats the gene extractor attempt and therefore repeats validator dispatch before failing with incomplete_flow_steps.
The batch validator uses fewer validator agent runs but still spends 27-32 seconds per four-request batch in this post-change run.

The corpus JSON exposes validator lookup_attempt audit records, not raw validator-agent tool-call counts, so it cannot prove whether the LLM made one physical search_genes_bulk call or copied itemized bulk lookup_attempts into each result.

tests.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml run --rm backend-unit-tests bash -lc "python -m pytest tests/unit/lib/domain_packs/test_validator_dispatch.py tests/unit/test_gene_allele_validator_result_contract.py -v --tb=short"
